info.name: Microsoft Azure ScopeConnections
info.description: The Microsoft Azure Virtual Network Manager API provides a RESTful set of web services that interact with Microsoft Azure Network Manager service to manage your network resources.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Scopeconnections Scopeconnectionname

request.description: Creates or updates scope connection from Network Manager

response.name: Updated - Returns information about the updates scope connection.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Created - Returns information about the new scope connection.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Scopeconnections Scopeconnectionname

request.description: Get specified scope connection created by this Network Manager.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Scopeconnections Scopeconnectionname

request.description: Delete the pending scope connection created by this network manager.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Request successful. The resource does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Networkmanagers Networkmanagername Scopeconnections

request.description: List all scope connections created by this network manager.

response.name: OK - Returns information about the scope connection(s).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
